Article Title: Unstoppable Seniors: Women Over 50 Shine at Times Internet Half Marathon
Article Text: NEW DELHI: The women’s 50 and above category at the Times Internet Half Marathon brought stories of resilience, late beginnings, and the power of steady effort.Nivedita Kapoor set the pace and claimed first place with a chip time of 1:48:13, delivering a performance defined by consistency and experience. Her steady approach carried her through the race, and her finish reflected a lifetime of disciplined effort, a testament to her enduring passion for distance running.Second place went to 53-year-old Nini Bhatia, who finished with a chip time of 2:05:40. Bhatia started running only in 2024, motivated by health concerns. She credits running with sharpening her mental clarity and transforming her well-being. For Bhatia, the sport has built her fitness and boosted her confidence.Reflecting on the marathon, Bhatia called it one of the best events she’s run, praising the route especially the stretch at India Gate, which stirred a sense of patriotism and made the experience even more memorable.Lakshmi Verma took third with a chip time of 2:12:24, adding depth to the competitive field. Her performance was marked by endurance and determination, and she finished strong, embodying the spirit of perseverance and the drive to keep moving forward.For many, this category was about more than just finish times. It represented journeys shaped by health goals, discipline, and personal growth. The presence of runners who began later in life showed that fitness can be embraced at any stage. As the race unfolded across Delhi, the women’s 50+ group stood as proof that consistency and determination are at the heart of endurance sports, no matter when the journey starts.At the Times Internet half marathon, the women’s 50+ category turned personal challenges into performance, demonstrating that resilience can redefine limits and that every step carries a story worth telling.
Article Summary: Nivedita kapoor set the pace and claimed first place with a chip time of 1:48:13. Second place went to 53-year-old nini bhatia, who started running only in 2024. The presence of runners who began later in life showed that fitness can be embraced at any stage.

Article Title: Ageless Achievements: Celebrating the 50+ Athletes at the Times Internet Half Marathon
Article Text: NEW DELHI: At the Times Internet Half Marathon, age was just a number as the men’s 50 and above category dazzled with stories of stamina and lifelong commitment.Leading the pack was 52-year-old Raj Kumar, who crossed the finish line with a stellar chip time of 1:24:40. With more than 25 years of running experience, Kumar’s journey began with a desire for fitness and gradually grew into a love for competition. An All India Civil Services athlete and record holder, he spoke warmly of the event, praising the crowd’s energy and the seamless arrangements.Harish Chandra claimed the second spot with a chip time of 1:28:58. For Chandra, running is a steady companion helping him stay fit and grounded. He views these marathons as an opportunity to maintain consistency and soak in the thrill of competition. Third place went to 58-year-old Ghanshyam Pandey, who finished in 1:31:04. A former serviceman and a regular on the marathon circuit, Pandey’s passion for running has seen him complete a marathon almost every month for over a decade. Pandey believes running is both a discipline and a way of life, a habit forged in his years of service.For him, each race is about more than just the numbers; it’s about proving endurance and commitment, again and again.The 50+ category proved that dedication knows no age limits. These runners brought with them not just experience, but a powerful commitment to staying active and pushing their own boundaries. As the marathoners made their way through Delhi’s streets, the event became a celebration of perseverance, discipline, and the unyielding spirit of self-improvement.At the Times Internet Half Marathon, age stood not as a limitation, but as proof of years of discipline and effort. The category reflected endurance built over time. And stories that go far beyond the finish line.
Article Summary: At the times internet half marathon, age stood not as a limitation, but as proof of years of discipline and effort. The 50+ category proved that dedication knows no age limits. The event became a celebration of perseverance, discipline, and the unyielding spirit of self-improvement.

Article Title: Patrick Mahomes Injury Update: Patrick Mahomes' comeback remains uncertain ahead of the 2026 NFL Draft: when will he return?
Article Text:
(Image via: Getty)

When Will Patrick Mahomes Be Back? Chiefs Enter Draft With No Clear Answer



As the 2026 NFL Draft approaches, the Kansas City Chiefs are facing an offseason unlike any they’ve had in the Patrick Mahomes era. The million-dollar question or rather, the multi-year contract question, is the timeline for their franchise quarterback’s return.The Reality of the Injury Mahomes, who tore both his ACL and LCL in a devastating blow against the Chargers back on December 14, 2025, is now four months into a long, grueling recovery. Surgery in Dallas confirmed the severity of the damage, and since then, the team has been meticulously managing his rehab.The good news is that Mahomes was in attendance for the start of the Chiefs' voluntary offseason program this week. Head coach Andy Reid has been optimistic, noting that Mahomes is hitting his marks: he’s in meetings, doing weight training, and working closely with the training staff. But the team is being cagey for a reason.As Reid put it, they are going to "play it by ear" and be smart about the process. While Mahomes has publicly stated his goal is to be ready for Week 1 with no restrictions, he’s also wise enough to admit that he can't predict how his knee will react to the increased intensity of on-field work.This uncertainty has completely shifted the vibe of this year’s draft for Kansas City. Usually, the Chiefs are drafting to solidify a championship roster around a healthy MVP. This year, they are drafting with insurance in mind.The front office already made a major move in March by trading for Justin Fields from the New York Jets. By bringing in Fields, the Chiefs have secured a high-upside backup who can lead the offense if Mahomes isn't 100% by September. This move was huge because it takes the "panic" out of the draft. They no longer have to reach for a quarterback just to survive the first month of the season.Instead, the team can focus on drafting the best players available to bolster the protection around whoever is taking the snaps. Whether it's beefing up the offensive line to keep the pocket clean or grabbing another explosive playmaker to make life easier for the quarterback, the draft strategy has pivoted from "maintaining the dynasty" to "building a bridge."The bottom line is that while Mahomes is pushing to beat the odds and be back for the season opener, the organization is clearly preparing for a scenario where he might need a few extra weeks. For Chiefs fans, the goal for this draft is simple: build a team that can win even if the MVP isn't out there for the first kickoff.
Article Summary: Patrick mahomes tore both his acl and lcl in a devastating blow against the chargers back on december 14, 2025. Mahomes has publicly stated his goal is to be ready for week 1 with no restrictions, but he’s also wise enough to admit that he can't predict how his knee will react to the increased intensity.

Article Title: Mike Vrabel: "He fathered her child": Dianna Russini’s alleged confession about her older son adds a new twist to the Mike Vrabel saga
Article Text:
Dianna Russini’s alleged confession about her older son adds a new twist to the Mike Vrabel saga.(Image via Getty Images)

Dianna Russini might have hinted at her alleged affair with Mike Vrabel through her child



Mike Vrabel stepped away from NFL Draft after he reportedly got to know his pictures with Dianna Russini from 2020 will be published



Mike Vrabel, the New England Patriots’ head coach, has publicly announced that he is taking some time off to seek counselling as the alleged affair rumors with Dianna Russini refuse to die down.Amid all the mess, it seems the situation has taken a turn for the worse as Dianna Russini’s husband and child have been dragged into the drama.In the last few hours, a post of Dianna Russini about the birth of her child with her husband, Kevin Goldschmidt, has sparked shockwaves across the league.The post made on 11th August, 2021, reads as, “Keep looking at my almost 4 day old son Michael while trying to figure out who are the best Michaels to ever play and coach in the NFL?”While the post seems like an innocent question related to the name of her child, it has raised eyebrows considering Mike Vrabel’s legal name is Michael George Vrabel.With the former The New York Times’ popular NFL reporter and insider, Dianna Russini naming her first born the same name as her alleged affair partner, it has sparked outrage among fans.This has also led to Barstool Sports’ Dave Portnoy to make a post that read as, “I can’t believe that I think there is a chance Russini fathered Vrabel’s child. That is how nuts this has gotten. You just can’t name your kid the same name as the guy you are having an affair with.”To make matters worse, just a couple of hours ago, Page Six published photos of Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini engaged in a kiss at a New York City bar in 2020.This has now raised concerns about Dianna Russini’s first born as many fans are urging her husband to get a DNA test done.However, both Dianna Russini and her husband, Kevin Goldschmidt, have stayed distant from all the rumors about their marriage going downhill as their oldest son gets dragged into the drama.Interestingly, as per Page Six, the outlet did ask for Mike Vrabel and Dianna Russini’s comments before publishing their photos together from 2020.Just hours later, the New England Patriots’ head coach announced that he will be stepping away from the NFL Draft as he seeks counselling for all the things that have been happening in his life.The popular NFL insider and reporter, Dianna Russini, has stayed silent as their new pictures spark shockwaves across the league.
Article Summary: Dianna russini’s alleged confession about her older son adds a new twist to the mike vrabel saga. The new england patriots’ head coach has publicly announced that he is taking some time off to seek counselling as the alleged affair rumors refuse to die down.

Article Title: Brazilian triathlete Mara Flavia Araujo’s final Instagram post resurfaces after Ironman Texas swim tragedy leaves fans heartbroken
Article Text:
Brazilian triathlete Mara Flavia Araujo’s final Instagram post resurfaces after Ironman Texas swim tragedy leaves fans heartbroken (Image via Getty)

Mara Flavia Araujo’s final Instagram post and what happened during Ironman Texas swim

“We are saddened to confirm the death of a participant in the race during the swimming portion of today’s Ironman Texas triathlon. We send our deepest condolences to the family and friends and offer our support at this difficult time.

Thanks to the emergency services for their quick intervention.”

“She was ill before the trip, she wasn’t okay. My wife and I spoke with her to say she was too weak for this race, although a couple of days ago when we talked to her, she insisted she was okay. I still cannot believe what’s happened.

Our thoughts are with her friends and family members. May she rest in peace.”

The sports world woke up to heartbreaking news after Brazilian triathlete Mara Flavia Araujo lost her life during a race in the United States. She went missing during the swimming leg of the Ironman Texas triathlon on April 19, 2026. The event took place at Lake Woodlands, where she disappeared in the water during the early hours of the race. What makes this even more emotional is what surfaced after. Just hours before the race, her last Instagram post started circulating online. In that post, she was seen sitting calmly near a swimming pool, dressed for training. At that moment, nothing looked unusual. But now, that same post feels very different to people who followed her journey.In her last Instagram update, Mara Flavia Araujo looked focused and ready. She wore her swim gear and sat by the pool, possibly preparing for the big race ahead. Her caption was simple, and like many athletes, she shared it as part of her daily routine. There was no sign of trouble.However, things changed quickly during the race. The Ironman event includes a 2.4-mile swim, followed by cycling and running. During the swimming section, Mara went missing.Rescue teams were alerted around 7:30 a.m. local time. After hours of search using sonar and dive teams, her body was found around 9:40 a.m.Event organizers later confirmed the news in an official statement shared with media, including Chosun.com. They said:More details came out through a report by Yahoo. According to her close friend Taveira, Mara had not been feeling well before traveling for the race. He shared:Mara Flavia was 38 years old and came from São Paulo, Brazil. She had around 60,000 followers on social media and was known for sharing her fitness journey. Her sudden death has left fans, friends, and the sports community in shock, with many now revisiting her final post and leaving messages of support for her family.
Article Summary: Brazilian triathlete mara flavia araujo’s final instagram post resurfaces after ironman texas swim tragedy leaves fans heartbroken. She went missing during the swimming leg of the ironmantexas triathlon on april 19, 2026. The event took place at lake woodlands, where she disappeared in the water.

Article Title: Inspiration story of the day: Usain Bolt: From a carefree dreamer to the fastest man alive, how pain, discipline, and obsession made him immortal
Article Text:
Usain Bolt (Image credit: Instagram)

Usain Bolt: Hard work made the greatest legend on the track

“Dreams are free. Goals have a cost. While you can daydream for free, goals don’t come without a price. Time, Effort, Sacrifice, and Sweat. How will you pay for your goals?”This powerful quote from Usain Bolt is more than just motivation. It gives a clear look into the mindset of one of the greatest athletes in history. Bolt was not just fast on the track or the “fastest man alive”. He was disciplined for it. His words remind us that success is not magic. It is a result of daily hard work!Bolt believed that dreaming is easy. Anyone can imagine success. But turning those dreams into reality takes commitment. It takes long hours of training. It takes pushing your body beyond limits. It takes saying no to comfort and yes to effort.Usain Bolt’s journey proves that he practices what he preaches. He is widely seen as the greatest sprinter of all time. Born in 1986, the Jamaican star won eight Olympic gold medals. He also holds world records in the 100 metres, 200 metres, and 4×100 metres relay.Usain Bolt grew up in Sherwood Content, Jamaica, loving cricket and football before teachers spotted his speed. Guided at William Knibb High, he won 200m gold at 2002 World Juniors at 15.Bolt made history at the 2008 Beijing Olympics. He shocked the world with record-breaking runs.He became the first man to hold both the 100m and 200m world records in the modern timing era. His performances were not just wins. They were statements.He continued his dominance at the 2012 London Olympics and at the 2016 Rio Olympics. Bolt became the only sprinter to win the Olympic 100m and 200m titles three times in a row. That level of consistency is rare in sports.Behind these achievements was intense preparation. Bolt trained hard for years. He worked on his speed, strength, and technique. On race day, he looked relaxed and confident. But that calmness came from the work he had already done.His world record of 9.58 seconds in the 100m, set in 2009, still stands today. It is one of the greatest achievements in athletics. He also broke the 200m record with a time of 19.19 seconds. These numbers are not just records. They are proof of what dedication can achieve.Bolt retired after the 2017 World Championships. He ended his career as an 11-time world champion. Even in his final race, fans saw his fighting spirit.This quote reflects Bolt’s life perfectly. He paid the price for his goals. He gave his time. He gave his effort. And he made sacrifices.For young athletes and dreamers, the message is simple. If you want success, you must be ready to work for it. Dreams may be free. But greatness always comes at a cost!
Article Summary: Usain bolt is widely seen as the greatest sprinter of all time. The jamaican star won eight olympic gold medals. He also holds world records in the 100 metres, 200 metres, and 4×100 metres relay. Bolt retired after the 2017 world championships. He ended his career as an 11-time world champion.

Article Title: IPL 2026: No MS Dhoni again; CSK captain Ruturaj Gaikwad says 'thanks to the legend' at the toss vs Mumbai Indians
Article Text:
Hardik Pandya and Ruturaj Gaikwad (BCCI/IPL Photo)

Watch Mahela Jayawardene on poor bowling, combinations & team issues Mahela Jayawardene on poor bowling, combinations & team issues

Mumbai Indians (Playing XI):

Chennai Super Kings (Playing XI):

NEW DELHI:The anticipation around MS Dhoni ’s return was high, but it wasn’t to be as the veteran remained out of action. Mumbai Indians won the toss and opted to field against Chennai Super Kings in their IPL 2026 clash at the Wankhede Stadium on Thursday.Dhoni is yet to feature in IPL 2026. He has been recovering from a calf strain sustained just before the tournament began late last month, and expectations from fans had built up significantly ahead of the marquee encounter.A day before the match, Dhoni lit up the stadium, entertaining camerapersons, groundstaff and crew members with his lighter side. He was seen playing with the robot dog “Champak” during a practice session at Wankhede Stadium. The five-time IPL-winning captain had a rigorous training session on Tuesday, where he kept wickets and later spent time batting in the nets.On Wednesday, he had a short initial stint before taking a break, returning later for nearly an hour to face throwdown specialists and fast bowlers.However, for fans, the wait to see their superstar continues.Mumbai Indians captain Hardik Pandya, after winning the toss, said: "We are gonna bowl first.Lot of boxes were ticked, intensity was there, we needed that game where everyone comes in and chips in. There was a conscious effort that intensity is in your hands, we wanted to just have fun and things went our way. It looks green, but it played really well. Same team."On the other hand, CSK captain Ruturaj Gaikwad made one change to the XI." We would have bowled first as well, but it was a 50-50 call. It looks a good wicket and coming here at Wankhede Stadium, you have to bat well irrespective of whether you’re batting first or bowling first. So it is just about putting up a great show even if you’re batting first. We are doing really well. It’s just that we are not able to cash in on a couple of moments. But I think we pulled it back really well during our bowling in the last game. Even batting, we had started off really well. But as I said, it’s just a couple of moments where we have to make sure we cash in and we get that win. But everyone is confident and ready to go," he said."(Wherever you go, men in yellow, there’s a lot of noise?) Yes, obviously all thanks to the legend (Dhoni) who is not here unfortunately. But obviously it is because of him. Everywhere you go, we have a lot of support. So hopefully we’ll make them happy tonight. We’ve got a couple of changes," the CSK captain said.Quinton de Kock(w), Naman Dhir, Suryakumar Yadav, Hardik Pandya(c), Tilak Varma, Sherfane Rutherford, Mitchell Santner, Jasprit Bumrah, Krish Bhagat, AM Ghazanfar, Ashwani KumarSanju Samson(w), Ruturaj Gaikwad(c), Sarfaraz Khan, Dewald Brevis, Shivam Dube, Kartik Sharma, Jamie Overton, Noor Ahmad, Anshul Kamboj, Gurjapneet Singh, Mukesh Choudhary
Article Summary: Dhoni is yet to feature in ipl 2026. He has been recovering from a calf strain sustained just before the tournament began. Chennai super kings captain ruturaj gaikwad made one change to the xi. Mumbai indians won the toss and opted to field.

Article Title: Nfl Trade Rumor: NFL Trade Rumor: Washington Commanders could target $120M San Francisco 49ers star to boost offense around Jayden Daniels
Article Text:
Washington Commanders could target $120M San Francisco 49ers star to boost offense around Jayden Daniels.(Image via X)

Washington Commanders could make a move for San Francisco 49ers ’ star player, Brandon Aiyuk



The Washington Commanders recorded a brutal run on the field in the last season as the team managed to win just 5 games while losing in 12.This was a major decline since the 2024 season, when the Washington Commanders recorded 12 wins and 5 losses. With Jayden Daniels sustaining major injuries, it seems the team is focused on fixing its roster ahead of the new season.A few hours ago, Bleacher Report’s Alex Kay linked the San Francisco 49ers’ star player, Brandon Aiyuk, to the Washington Commanders.Bleacher Report’s Alex Kay noted in a recent report, “The Commanders aren't swimming in picks, but do possess four Day 3 selections. One of these could be used to reunite Aiyuk with Jayden Daniels, recreating a pairing that found success at Arizona State in 2019. Aiyuk led the Sun Devils with a team-high 65 catches for 1,192 yards and eight touchdowns during that season.”Bleacher Report’s Alex Kay added, “That established rapport could help Aiyuk find his footing and return to form quickly following an extended layoff. Washington would benefit heavily from a healthy Aiyuk too, as the club has little in the way of proven pass-catchers outside of aging Pro Bowler Terry McLaurin.”However, the Washington Commanders have stayed away from confirming the trade speculations concerning Brandon Aiyuk.As per a recent post by popular insider Ari Meirov, it seems the San Fransciso 49ers have not had much luck with trade talks on Brandon Aiyuk.Ari Meirov's recent post on X reads as, “#49ers GM John Lynch said he’s had trade discussions with teams on WR Brandon Aiyuk but acknowledged it’s not a high probability they find a taker.”The post added, ‘We’ll see it through the draft — if something happens, great. If not, we’ll re-evaluate after…’”The San Francisco 49ers’ star player, Brandon Aiyuk, has experienced a pretty difficult time in the last few seasons as he dealt with his brutal knee injuries.The 28 year old wide receiver was placed on PUP in the last season and missed out on playing in any of the games in 2025.Brandon Aiyuk also played in only 7 games in 2024 before he tore his ACL and MCL in Week 8 against the Kansas City Chiefs.Back then, he had finished the season with 25 receptions for 374 yards and 0 touchdowns.For now, as fans await for Brandon Aiyuk to bounce back on the field, all eyes are on where he ends up in the new season.
Article Summary: Washington commanders could target $120m san francisco 49ers star to boost offense around jayden daniels. Aiyuk led the sun devils with a team-high 65 catches for 1,192 yards and eight touchdowns during that season. Washington commanders have stayed away from confirming the trade speculations concerning brandon aiyuk.

Article Title: 2026 NFL Mock Draft: Players favored for Atlanta Falcons, Carolina Panthers, Detroit Lions, and Green Bay Packers
Article Text:
2026 NFL Mock Draft: Players favored for Atlanta Falcons, Carolina Panthers, Detroit Lions, and Green Bay Packers (Image via Getty[clockwise]: Logos of Detroit Lions, Green Bay Packers, Carolina Panthers, and Atlanta Falcons)

College football players picked by experts for Falcons, Panthers, Lions, and Packers

Players rooted for the Atlanta Falcons

Players picked for Carolina Panthers

Players lined up for the Detroit Lions

Players selected for the Green Bay Packers

The 2026 NFL Draft is from April 23 to April 25. It begins on Thursday, April 23, at 8 PM ET. Several analysts and experts have been pairing college football players with NFL teams for weeks and months now. But just to brush up on the predictions, here are some examples:The Falcons have been linked to three quarterbacks: QB Athan Kaliakmanis from Rutgers Scarlet Knights, QB Haynes King from Georgia Tech Yellow Jackets, and QB Jack Strand from Minnesota State-Moorhead Dragons. As for the Panthers, they are linked to Oregon Ducks safety Dillon Thieneman and tight end Kenyon Sadiq.USA TODAY’s Ayrton Ostly picked San Diego State Aztecs cornerback Chris Johnson for the Falcons. The predictor notes that Atlanta does not have a first-round pick, but if they see Johnson available at Round 2, they may jump at the opportunity to acquire him. He is a scheme-versatile CB who can be paired with A.J. Terrell. His athleticism is ideal for defensive coordinator Jeff Ulbrich’s zone coverages.WXII 12 News selected Indiana Hoosiers wide receiver Omar Cooper Jr. for the Panthers. Carolina GM Dan Morgan has chosen a receiver in the first round for the past two years: Tetairoa McMillan and Xavier Legette.Legette did not turn out to be the kind of WR the team had hoped for.As for 2024 undrafted Jalen Coker, he emerged as reliable receiver for Bryce Young, but the team won’t fully commit to him. Enter Omar Cooper Jr. He recorded 1000 yards with 13 TDs and even won a national championship. He has proven himself and has sure hands. He has true star potential and would be a great addition to Carolina.NFL Insider Tim Twentyman projects Georgia Bulldogs offensive tackle Monroe Freeling for the Lions. Freeling has a relative athletic score of 9.99 out of 10.0; he ranks No. 2 out of 1,519 offensive tackles dating back to 1987. Detroit loves athletic traits.Alongside Penei Sewell, the Lions would have two of the most athletic bookend tackles in the league, and they could be very dangerous on the edges in the run game.Packers Wire’s Brennen Rupp chose Texas Tech Red Raiders defensive tackle Lee Hunter for Green Bay. The 6-foot-3, 318-pounder has the natural girth to block running lanes, and he clocked 10.5 tackles for loss, 2.5 sacks, 26 pressures, and 25 stops last season. Hunter visited the Packers, so there could be something brewing between them.Alabama Crimson Tide wide receiver Germie Bernard [Falcons Wire]South Carolina Gamecocks cornerback Brandon Cisse [FanSided]Toledo Rockets safety Emmanuel McNeil-Warren [FOX Sports]Texas A&M Aggies wide receiver Kevin “KC” Concepcion [The Athletic]Tennessee Volunteers cornerback Jermod McCoy [CBS Sports]Penn State Nittany Lions guard Olaivavega “Vega” Ioane [The Athletic]Ohio State Buckeyes cornerback Davison Igbinosun [SB Nation]Illinois Fighting Illini outside linebacker Gabe Jacas [Packers Wire].
Article Summary: 2026 nfl mock draft: players favored for atlanta falcons, carolina panthers, detroit lions, and green bay packers. The 2026 nfl draft is from april 23 to april 25. It begins on thursday, april 23, at 8 pm et.

Article Title: Patrick Mahomes And Jermod Mccoy: Patrick Mahomes' unique connection sends Jermod McCoy’s draft stock into spotlight as NFL attention builds
Article Text:
Patrick Mahomes' unique connection sends Jermod McCoy’s draft stock into spotlight as NFL attention builds (Image via Getty)

How the Patrick Mahomes link and early bond push Jermod McCoy back into the NFL Draft talk

Jermod McCoy is getting more attention than most cornerbacks in the 2026 NFL Draft class, and the reason goes beyond his tape at Tennessee. A quiet but interesting link to Patrick Mahomes , the Kansas City Chiefs quarterback, has pushed his name back into conversations right before draft season heats up. What makes it stand out is not just football talent, but shared history that keeps resurfacing at the right time.McCoy and Mahomes both have roots in Tyler, Texas, and they crossed paths long before the NFL spotlight. That old connection has now become a talking point as scouts reevaluate McCoy’s upside after his injury setback.The connection between Jermod McCoy and Patrick Mahomes goes back to their early playing days in Tyler. Both attended Whitehouse High School, a program known for producing strong athletes in multiple sports. Mahomes graduated in 2014 and already had the buzz of a dual-sport star. McCoy came years later, but the link stayed alive through community ties and shared coaching circles.Also, the link doesn't end there. Patrick Mahomes' dad, the former MLB pitcher Patrick Mahomes Sr., coached McCoy in baseball.Plus, one moment that keeps getting attention occurred in Feb.2026 during the NFL Combine. McCoy posted a throwback photo with Mahomes on social media, originally taken during their early school days. Mahomes reposted it around the same time, which sparked fresh interest among fans and analysts tracking draft prospects. The timing of the post was particularly noteworthy, as McCoy is currently recovering from a torn ACL sustained during offseason training in January 2025.At the 2020 Super Bowl media week, McCoy had earlier wished Mahomes luck through a post that again resurfaced this year among draft analysts. While it was a simple gesture, it showed the early admiration McCoy had for the Chiefs quarterback long before entering college football.On the field, McCoy built his reputation at Oregon State before transferring to Tennessee, where he showed strong coverage skills and ball tracking ability. His 2024 season included four interceptions and steady pass breakups before the injury halted his momentum.NFL scouts now weigh both his production and recovery timeline. Some projections still place him late in the first round, with teams like the Kansas City Chiefs holding mid-to-late picks. That has only added more discussion around a possible reunion storyline, even if no team has made a clear move yet.For now, McCoy’s draft stock sits in a tight range. But the Mahomes connection keeps his name active in NFL conversations, especially as teams revisit his upside ahead of April 2026.
Article Summary: Patrick mahomes' unique connection sends jermod mccoy’s draft stock into spotlight as nfl attention builds. Mccoy posted a throwback photo with mahomes on social media, originally taken during their early school days. Mahomes reposted it around the same time, which sparked fresh interest among fans and analysts tracking draft prospects.

Article Title: NFL Mock Draft 2026: Players picked for San Francisco 49ers, Seattle Seahawks, Washington Commanders, and Buffalo Bills
Article Text:
NFL Mock Draft 2026: Players chosen for San Francisco 49ers, Seattle Seahawks, Washington Commanders, and Buffalo Bills (Image via Getty [clockwise]: Logos of Seattle Seahawks, Washington Commanders, San Francisco 49ers, and Buffalo Bills)

Potential football players selected for 49ers, Commanders, Bills, and Seahawks

Players rooted for the San Francisco 49ers

Players picked for Washington Commanders

Players lined up for the Seattle Seahawks

Players favored for the Buffalo Bills

The 2026 NFL Draft is here. The event will be held in Pittsburgh. Round 1 on April 23 at 8 PM ET. Rounds 2 and 3 on April 24 at 7 PM ET. And Rounds 4, 5, 6, and 7 on April 25 at noon ET.The NFL announced that 16 players will be attending the draft in person: Ohio State safety Caleb Downs and defensive tackle Kayden McDonald, Alabama quarterback Ty Simpson, Notre Dame running back Jeremiyah Love, and more. Some of them are predicted for the four teams we’ll be discussing now.For instance, Downs is projected for the Commanders, McDonald for the Seahawks and the Bills. As for the 49ers, they are linked to Omar Cooper Jr. and KC Concepcion, but ESPN did not mention them in the attending 16 players list. Anyhow, let’s check out the top prospects picked by several analysts and experts for each team.ESPN’s Mel Kiper Jr. picked Indiana Hoosiers wide receiver Omar Cooper Jr. for San Francisco. The roster needs to add a receiver, and Cooper could bring a run-after-catch element that fits perfectly with head coach Kyle Shanahan’s scheme. He displayed impeccable vision, patience, and contact strength in 2025, recording 13 receiving touchdowns.Hogs Haven’s MattInBrisVegas projects Ohio State Buckeyes linebacker Sonny Styles for Washington. Styles is the best player available in a deep linebacker class.His dominated the 2026 NFL Combine with a total score of 95, earning the top spot among all linebackers.The predictor mentioned a fun story attached to the linebacker’s name. As per his mother, Laverna Styles, “He had such a hot temper, so we named him after Sonny from ‘The Godfather’ because when he and little Lorenzo [his brother and fellow NFL draft prospect] would get into an argument, he would get so mad. He could go from zero to ten in the blink of an eye, so his nickname became Sonny.”NFL Network’s Maddy Glab chose Washington Huskies wide receiver Denzel Boston for the Bills. He is projected at No. 26. According to ClutchPoints’ Garrett Kerman, the Huskies WR is the best contested-catch receiver in this entire draft class.He caught 10 of 13 contested catches in 2025, which gives him a 76.9% contested-catch rate. Josh Allen wants his receivers to be where they’re supposed to be and be dependable, and Boston fits the profile to a T.Sports Illustrated’s Michael Hanich selected Arkansas Razorbacks running back Mike Washington Jr. for the Seahawks. Kenneth Walker III left for Kansas City.There is a definitive lack of experience at running back; Zach Charbonnet could be out for the whole season. That’s where a top rookie RB like Washington comes into play. He rushed for 1,070 yards and eight touchdowns on 167 carries, while also catching 28 receptions for 226 yards and one receiving touchdown.Washington Huskies running back Jonah Coleman [Sports Illustrated]Utah Utes offensive tackle Caleb Lomu [ESPN]Texas Tech Red Raiders linebacker Jacob Rodriguez [NFL Network]Indiana Hoosiers running back Kaelon Black [Commanders Wire]Tennessee Volunteers cornerback Colton Hood [The Athletic]UCF Knights edge rusher Malachi Lawrence [ESPN]Clemson Tigers defensive end T.J. Parker [The Ringer]Penn State Nittany Lions quarterback Drew Allar [CBS Sports].

After nine thrilling matches last week, a trend is beginning to emerge on which teams are on a roll and which are still struggling to settle into the new season. So far, 15 matches have been played in the new season of the IPL , and four teams have already set the early marker in the race for the playoffs.With four wins in four matches, Rajasthan Royals sit at the top of the points table. Punjab Kings are at second after two wins and a no result due to rain. They are followed by defending champions Royal Challengers Bengaluru, Delhi Capitals and Lucknow Super Giants, who have two wins each so far. Meanwhile, Chennai Super Kings and Kolkata Knight Riders are two winless teams in IPL 2026.With a win each, Sunrisers Hyderabad, Mumbai Indians, and Gujarat Titans have opened their account in the standings and will look to challenge the top four in coming fixtures.The ongoing IPL season has already witnessed multiple weather disruptions across the country. The KKR vs PBKS clash in Kolkata was washed out, while the RR vs MI encounter had to be curtailed to just 11 overs per side in which Rajasthan Royals outclassed Mumbai Indians by 27 runs. And on Wednesday, GT held their nerves to beat hosts DC by one run in a last-ball thriller.KKR lost their 3rd match in a row after Mukul Choudhary pulled off a record breaking chase for LSG in the last-ball thriller.Rajasthan Royals and Royal Challengers Bengaluru, face off in Guwahati on Friday.The weekend double-headers will see Punjab Kings take on Sunrisers Hyderabad and Chennai Super Kings face Delhi Capitals on Saturday, followed by Lucknow Super Giants vs Gujarat Titans and Mumbai Indians vs Royal Challengers Bengaluru on Sunday.There is likely to be plenty of shuffling in the points table this week.

Article Title: Pittsburgh Penguins goaltender Stuart Skinner faces uncertain future amid team’s NHL playoff struggles and trade rumors
Article Text:
Stuart Skinner #74 of the Pittsburgh Penguins takes a break during the second period against the Philadelphia Flyers in Game Three of the First Round of the 2026 Stanley Cup Playoffs at Xfinity Mobile Arena on April 22, 2026 in Philadelphia, Pennsylvania. (Photo by Bruce Bennett/Getty Images)

Watch Stuart Skinner, Penguins, on Game 1 loss to Flyers Stuart Skinner, Penguins, on Game 1 loss to Flyers

Stuart Skinner of Pittsburgh Penguins' future uncertain after Flyers playoff struggles



The Pittsburgh Penguins face an important offseason, following a miserable showing in their Stanley Cup Playoffs series against the Philadelphia Flyers. Stuart Skinner, the goaltender, has been a center of conversation after a spotty performance in the season debuts.This case with Skinner is indicative of a greater doubt in the roster planning in Pittsburgh. With the end of the contract questions and enthusiasm after the competitive regular season, the management is under a strain to make decisions that may affect the competitiveness of the team in the NHL in the short-term.The performances against the Philadelphia Flyers possibly put a question mark on the future of Stuart Skinner with the Pittsburgh Penguins. The goaltender had a problem with not making reliable saves in crucial playoff situations, casting doubt on his ability to work as a long-term solution.The first few games of the series saw Philadelphia take advantage of defensive shortcomings as well as goaltending failures. Otherwise promising at one time, Skinner has failed to deliver the same in high-pressure postseason scenarios. This has stirred debate on whether or not Pittsburgh is considering other options during the offseason.General manager of the Pittsburgh Penguins, Kyle Dubas, may consider new options in goaltending to enhance the team.As Skinner enters the free-agency period and has little long-term commitment, the front office might be more interested in net stability.The Penguins are said to have in-house opportunities and possible trade partners at their disposal. According to NHL trade rumors, making a departure could be realistic because of the teams that could be interested in Skinner as they seek cost-effective goaltending depth. The decision will also be dependent on financial flexibility and roster balance.The series of Philadelphia Flyers has directly influenced the trade rumors of Stuart Skinner in the NHL with regard to the Pittsburgh Penguins. The shortcomings revealed highlighted by strong performances by Philadelphia may hasten a roster change.Skinner is one prominent name in trade talks, as NHL changes are announced. His case, regardless of his continuation or departure, brings to the fore the rate at which playoff performances can change the course of a player within the league.
Article Summary: Pittsburgh penguins face an important offseason, following a miserable showing in their stanley cup playoffs series against the philadelphia flyers. Stuart skinner, the goaltender, has been a center of conversation after a spotty performance in the season debuts.

Article Title: IPL 2026: Ravi Shastri almost blunders at toss; forgets Ruturaj Gaikwad's name in MI vs CSK match - Watch
Article Text:
Ravi Shastri (l), Hardik Pandya, and Ruturaj Gaikwad

Watch Varun Aaron on team performance & key moments Varun Aaron on team performance & key moments

Teams

Mumbai Indians:

Chennai Super Kings:

A brief pause at the toss caught attention as commentator Ravi Shastri appeared to forget the name of Chennai Super Kings captain Ruturaj Gaikwad during the IPL 2026 match against Mumbai Indians on Thursday.While conducting the toss, Shastri introduced Mumbai Indians skipper Hardik Pandya but stopped briefly before naming Gaikwad."For the Blues (MI), it's Hardik Pandya, for the yellow," Shastri paused briefly before taking the name of "Ruturaj Gaikwad".Pandya won the toss and chose to bowl first in the match between the two five-time champions.Mumbai Indians went in with the same playing XI from their previous game, with Rohit Sharma missing his third straight match due to a hamstring issue.For Chennai Super Kings, MS Dhoni is still recovering from a calf strain and has not played a game in IPL 2026.Speaking at the toss, Pandya said, "We are going to bowl first. I think a lot of boxes were ticked (in the last match against GT). The intensity was there. I think we needed that kind of a game where everyone comes in and chips in. Yeah, we had a perfect game. Yes, I think that was a conscious effort - that no matter what happens, intensity is in your control. I just wanted to make sure that we enjoy ourselves."Gaikwad said, "We would have bowled first as well, but it was a 50-50 call.It looks a good wicket and coming here at Wankhede Stadium, you have to bat well irrespective of whether you’re batting first or bowling first. So it is just about putting up a great show even if you’re batting first. We are doing really well. It’s just that we are not able to cash in on a couple of moments."Hardik Pandya (c), Quinton de Kock (wk), Naman Dhir, Suryakumar Yadav, Tilak Varma, Sherfane Rutherford, Mitchell Santner, Jasprit Bumrah, Krish Bhagat, AM Ghazanfar and Ashwani Kumar.Ruturaj Gaikwad (c), Sanju Samson (wk), Sarfaraz Khan, Dewald Brevis, Shivam Dube, Kartik Sharma, Jamie Overton, Noor Ahmad, Anshul Kamboj, Gurjapneet Singh and Mukesh Choudhary
Article Summary: Ravi shastri appeared to forget the name of chennai super kings captain ruturaj gaikwad. Mumbai indians skipper hardik pandya won the toss and chose to bowl first. Ms dhoni is still recovering from a calf strain and has not played a game in ipl 2026.

Article Title: Csk Vs Mi: 103-run hammering: CSK hand MI their biggest IPL defeat as Sanju Samson, spinners lead rout
Article Text:
Photo/IPL

Watch Justin Langer on LSG batting failure and opens up on the team's bowling Justin Langer on LSG batting failure and opens up on the team's bowling

Biggest win margin for CSK in IPL (by runs)

103 vs MI, Wankhede, 2026*

97 vs KXIP, Chennai, 2015

93 vs DD, Abu Dhabi, 2014

92 vs RCB, Gqeberha, 2009

91 vs DC, DY Patil, 2022

Biggest defeat margin for MI in IPL (by runs)

103 vs CSK, Wankhede, 2026*

87 vs RR, Jaipur, 2013

85 vs SRH, Vizag, 2016

76 vs KXIP, Mohali, 2011

66 vs KXIP, Mohali, 2008

NEW DELHI: Chennai Super Kings registered their biggest win over Mumbai Indians in IPL history, beating them by 103 runs in their IPL 2026 clash at Mumbai's Wankhede Stadium on Thursday.The defeat was also the biggest margin for MI in IPL by runs.Playing his first IPL 'El Clasico', CSK's Sanju Samson scored an unbeaten 101 in the first innings, while Akeal Hosein returned figures of 4 for 17 in the second innings to demolish the Mumbai Indians batting.Mumbai Indians won the toss and chose to bowl. Chennai Super Kings posted 207 for 6, with Samson anchoring the innings. He hit 10 fours and six sixes in his 54-ball knock and stayed till the end, even as wickets fell regularly at the other end. The next highest score in the innings was 22.In reply, Mumbai Indians were bowled out for just 104 in 19 overs, their biggest defeat by runs in the IPL. Eight of their batters were dismissed for single-digit scores as they struggled against spin.Akeal Hosein led the bowling effort, while Noor Ahmad supported him with 2 for 23. The result helped Chennai Super Kings return to winning ways after their loss to Sunrisers Hyderabad.For Mumbai Indians, Tilak Varma (37) and Suryakumar Yadav (35) were the only batters to cross 30, but there was little support from the rest.Earlier in the match, there were signs of pressure from the start despite both teams coming in as seventh- and eighth-placed sides. On the first ball, Sherfane Rutherford missed a routine throw to the wicketkeeper, and the backing fielder at short fine leg also failed to collect cleanly.Bowler Jasprit Bumrah was seen asking his fielders to settle down before overstepping on the next delivery.During the chase, Tilak Varma and Jamie Overton were involved in a brief exchange on the field.For Mumbai Indians, AM Ghazanfar and Ashwani Kumar picked up two wickets each, while Bumrah finished with 1 for 31.
Article Summary: Chennai super kings register their biggest win over mumbai indians in ipl history. Csk beat mumbai by 103 runs in their ipl 2026 clash at mumbai's wankhede stadium. Sanju samson scored an unbeaten 101 in the first innings.

Article Title: Ipl 2026: IPL 2026: Will DC make changes to XI after defeat to SRH? Skipper Axar Patel clarifies
Article Text:
SRH vs DC

Watch Ashok Sharma story: Inside the village and house which shaped India's new pace sensation Ashok Sharma story: Inside the village and house which shaped India's new pace sensation

NEW DELHI: Sunrisers Hyderabad’s dominant win over Delhi Capitals was once again defined by Abhishek Sharma ’s explosive batting and a disciplined bowling effort led by Eshan Malinga. However, DC skipper Axar Patel remained calm after the defeat, suggesting no immediate panic or changes to the XI despite the heavy loss.Speaking after the match, Axar backed his squad and stressed that the team’s overall process was still on track. He said, "No, right now it doesn’t feel like that, because the kind of cricket that is going on - if you see, obviously we are batting well and bowling well. It feels like, I think you know, when the wicket is so good, then this should be considered an off day and forgotten."He also acknowledged missed opportunities in the field that hurt DC’s chances against Abhishek’s onslaught. "The run-out and the catch we missed - had we taken it, we could have restricted them," he said, while still giving full credit to SRH’s batting firepower.Axar further added that even good execution sometimes fails against extraordinary batting. "If someone bats that well, and their execution is not lacking, credit must be given for such a performance... when a batsman bats like this, the coach and the captain must accept that even a captain cannot stop someone," he explained.He also emphasised the importance of support within the team environment during tough games, particularly for bowlers under pressure.The match itself saw Abhishek Sharma produce a breathtaking unbeaten 135 off 68 balls, powering SRH to a massive 242/2. Despite a brief fightback from Delhi’s middle order, Malinga’s 4/32 broke the chase apart as DC were restricted to 195/9.Abhishek’s knock, supported by Travis Head and Heinrich Klaasen, ensured SRH’s dominance from the start, while Axar admitted that sometimes, opponents simply outplay you on the day.
Article Summary: Sunrisers hyderabad beat delhi capitals by eight wickets. Abhishek sharma top scored for srh with 135 off 68 balls. Eshan malinga took 4/32 as dc were restricted to 195/9. Dc captain axar patel remained calm after the defeat.

Article Title: Brooks Koepka: What is Brooks Koepka's net worth in 2026? Career, earnings, LIV Golf contract and PGA Tour comeback story
Article Text:
What is Brooks Koepka's net worth in 2026? Career, earnings, LIV Golf contract and PGA Tour comeback story (Image Via Getty Images)

Brooks Koepka's net worth and earnings

Brooks Koepka's major wins and golf career highlights

Brooks Koepka's move to LIV Golf and return to the PGA Tour

Brooks Koepka's personal life and early journey

Brooks Koepka is one of the most successful golfers of his generation. He is known for winning big tournaments and staying calm under pressure. Over the years, he has earned money from golf, brand deals, and league contracts. With his recent return to the PGA Tour, fans are once again talking about his net worth, career journey, and latest updates.According to Celebrity Net Worth, Brooks Koepka has a net worth of approximately $60 million. Throughout his PGA Tour career, he earned approximately $50 million in prize money. He generated significant income through his endorsement contracts with major companies. The 2022 deal brought him to LIV Golf, with a reported contract worth nearly $100 million. The deal brought him substantial financial benefits because it increased his overall earnings.Koepka emerged as a top player by winning the U.S. Open both in 2017 and 2018. He then won the PGA Championship in 2018, 2019, and again in 2023.These wins made him a five-time major champion. He also reached World No. 1 in the Official World Golf Ranking and held that position for 47 weeks.Although he had moved to LIV Golf, he was still maintaining a great performance.In 2023, he won the PGA Championship, marking the first LIV Golf player to win a major.In 2022, Koepka joined LIV Golf, a new league backed by Saudi Arabia. At that time, players who joined LIV were not allowed to play on the PGA Tour.In late 2025, he decided to leave LIV Golf and applied to return to the PGA Tour. In January 2026, his return was approved under a new rule called the “Returning Member Program.”As part of this, he agreed to financial penalties, including a reported $5 million charity payment and loss of some bonus benefits. He is expected to play again in PGA Tour events starting in 2026.Brooks Koepka was born on May 3, 1990, in Florida. He played college golf at Florida State University before turning professional in 2012. In his personal life, he got married to Jena Sims in the year 2022, and they have a son named Crew.
Article Summary: Brooks koepka is one of the most successful golfers of his generation. He is known for winning big tournaments and staying calm under pressure. Over the years, he has earned money from golf, brand deals, and league contracts. In 2022, he joined liv golf, a new league backed by saudi arabia.

Article Title: Mike Vrabel faces scrutiny after counseling decision, as Patriots brace for NFL Draft without their head coach
Article Text:
Mike Vrabel to miss NFL Draft day amid Dianna Russini scandal (Getty Images)

Why is Mike Vrabel missing Day 3 of the NFL Draft?

The New England Patriots will be without Mike Vrabel for part of the 2026 NFL Draft, but not when it matters most. Vrabel confirmed he will miss Day 3 while beginning counseling, a decision that arrives in the middle of growing scrutiny around his personal life. The timing, rather than the act itself, has drawn the loudest reaction. While he kept details limited, Vrabel addressed his team and the media with a tone that suggested both urgency and reflection as the draft continues.Mike Vrabel made it clear this was not a rushed call. Speaking publicly for the first time since photos surfaced of him with Dianna Russini in Arizona, he framed the decision as a step toward accountability rather than damage control.“As I said the other day, I promised my family, this organization and this team that I was going to give them the best version of me that I can possibly give them. In order to do so, I have committed to seeking counseling, starting this weekend. This is something that I have given a lot of thought to and is something I would advise a player to do if I was counseling them,” Vrabel said.“I have always wanted to lead by example, and I believe this is what I have to do to be the best husband, father and coach that I possibly can be.This is not an easy thing for me to admit, but it is one that I know will make me a better person. I appreciate the support that everyone has given me and promise a stronger resolve as a result.”He will remain present for the first two days of the draft, when most franchise-shaping decisions are made. Day 3, often seen as depth-building territory, is where he steps away. Whether that balance was intentional or simply practical remains unclear, but it has shaped how the move is being received.Is the timing of Mike Vrabel’s counseling raising concerns?The reaction has been less about counseling and more about when it is happening. Around the league and among fans, questions have surfaced quickly. Some see the decision as thoughtful. Others are not convinced.“Does it seem strange that after weeks of this story, he’s going to get counseling on Day 3 of the Draft? I have No opinion on whether Mike Vrabel needs counseling or not. It’s the timing that is really strange. why not last week or or next week?” one fan wondered.“Am I wrong that Vrabel missing the busiest day of roster acquisition for this is making THIS even worse???” another added.There is also curiosity about whether more details could emerge. “The timing of this is very concerning. Makes me think another shoe is about to drop,” a fan wrote, capturing the unease that still lingers.For now, the NFL is not stepping in. A league spokesperson confirmed there will be no review under the personal conduct policy, effectively closing that door. That leaves Mike Vrabel’s situation in a different space, one shaped more by perception than punishment. When the season begins, he is still expected to be on the sideline, but the conversation around him is unlikely to fade quickly.
Article Summary: New england patriots linebacker mike vrabel will miss day 3 of the nfl draft. The move comes amid growing scrutiny around his personal life. The timing, rather than the act itself, has drawn the loudest reaction from fans. He framed the decision as a step toward accountability rather than damage control.
